preview.prebuildCommand: npx expo prebuild --clean && find /Users/expo/workingdir/build/node_modules -name 'RNCSliderComponentView.mm' 2>/dev/null | while read f; do echo '// [OldArchFix] zeroed for Old Architecture' > "$f" && echo "[OldArchFix] zeroed: $f"; done
